featureName: BUG-049-003 Twitter API alert metric name + runbook docs drift
title: Twitter API alert references wrong metric name + missing operator runbook entries
discoveredBy: sweep round 10 (stochastic-quality-sweep, harden trigger, harden-to-doc mapped mode, parent-expanded-child-mode)

parentWorkflow.findingLens: Spec 049 contract regression — alerts + docs drift introduced by spec 056

completedPhaseClaimDetails.evidence: Aligned the 7-artifact bug packet (spec.md + design.md + scopes.md + scenario-manifest.json + report.md + uservalidation.md + state.json) under specs/049-monitoring-stack/bugs/BUG-049-003-twitter-alert-metric-and-docs-drift/; the harden-trigger finding from stochastic sweep round 10 was captured against config/prometheus/alerts.yml + docs/Operations.md.

Data-only fix shipped in commit af7abce3: config/prometheus/alerts.yml renamed smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries -> smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries_total (3 occurrences: header comment, TwitterAPIRetryStorm expr, description); docs/Operations.md Alert Runbook gained 2 rows (TwitterAPIRateLimitChronicExhaustion, TwitterAPIRetryStorm). Verified via grep + git show af7abce3 captured in report.md ### Code Diff Evidence.

go test ./internal/deploy/ -run 'TestMonitoringAlertsContract_LiveFile|TestMonitoringDocsContract_LiveFile' -count=1 -v -> both PASS (Exit 0). The pre-fix RED state was the two LiveFile contract failures the harden trigger surfaced; post-fix GREEN captured in report.md sections T-BUG-049-003-001 and T-BUG-049-003-002.

go test ./internal/deploy/ -run 'TestMonitoring|TestComposeContract_LiveFile|TestComposeResourceContract|TestFilesystemContract' -count=1 -v -> 32/32 sub-tests PASS (Exit 0), including the 5 adversarial monitoring sub-tests that re-block fabricated-metric, missing-required-alert, and missing-docs-mention drift. Captured in report.md section T-BUG-049-003-003.

The data-only correction collapses a metric-name mismatch; it introduces zero new abstractions, dead branches, or duplication. No simplification debt created on the alerts.yml or Operations.md surfaces.

Zero runtime-binary change — alerts.yml and Operations.md are config/docs surfaces consumed by Prometheus and operators. Stability characteristics of the monitoring stack are unchanged at HEAD af7abce3.
No new attack surface, no secret, no dependency change; the edit touches a Prometheus metric identifier and operator runbook prose only. gitleaks/PII policy clean on the staged bug-folder paths.

Guards green for the bug packet and parent: bug-folder state-transition-guard 0 BLOCKs at terminal status done, parent state-transition-guard PERMITTED, artifact-lint PASSED for both. Captured in report.md Validation Evidence.

git show af7abce3 confirms the alerts.yml + Operations.md delivery delta; the bug-folder ceremony edits are confined to specs/049-monitoring-stack/bugs/BUG-049-003-twitter-alert-metric-and-docs-drift/. Cross-commit attribution documented: implementation shipped in af7abce3 (commit body names BUG-049-003), ceremony close-out staged for the parent batch commit.

docs/Operations.md Alert Runbook now names both Twitter alerts (TestMonitoringDocsContract_LiveFile enforces this); report.md captures the full reconcile narrative plus Code Diff Evidence for the af7abce3 delivery delta.
